headline.purpose: Product page titles and high-level dashboard headings.

body.purpose: Tables, forms, alerts, explanatory copy, and dashboard controls.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Brief feedback for control and state transitions; no decorative choreography.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Decisive action button using FinResearch Agent's audit crimson.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.58 0.16 31); color: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.58 0.16 31); border-radius: 6px; padding: 4px 15px; height: 32px; font: 520 14px/1.5715 Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; transition: background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.42 0.13 31); border-color: oklch(0.42 0.13 31); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.78 0.09 31); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: App Header
components.description: Sticky light global navigation with crimson active state and compact product controls.
components.css: .ds-app-header { background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.18 0.018 250); min-height: 60px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 0 32px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.94 0.007 250); font: 400 14px/1.5715 Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-app-header strong { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 650; } .ds-tag { background: oklch(0.96 0.02 31); color: oklch(0.42 0.13 31); border-radius: 4px; padding: 0 7px; line-height: 22px; } .ds-app-header nav { margin-left: 8px; color: oklch(0.42 0.014 250); }

components.name: Metric Card
components.description: Compact Ant Design-style metric grouping for backtest gross/net statistics.
components.css: .ds-metric-card { background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.94 0.007 250); border-radius: 6px; padding: 12px 16px; font: 400 14px/1.5715 Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-metric-card h3 { margin: 0 0 12px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 620; color: oklch(0.18 0.018 250); } .ds-metric-card dl { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 12px; margin: 0; } .ds-metric-card dt { color: oklch(0.42 0.014 250); } .ds-metric-card dd { margin: 0; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 650; color: oklch(0.18 0.018 250); }

narrative.overview: A calm, dense financial research dashboard with its own white, crimson, and teal identity. Ant Design remains an implementation substrate, but the default navy/blue brand is not the target.

rules.name: The Evidence Color Rule
rules.body: Crimson means user intent. Teal means evidence quality. Amber means caveat. Red means failure or destructive risk.

rules.name: The Audit Surface Rule
rules.body: Working surfaces should feel printable and inspectable. If a shadow is not communicating an overlay relationship, remove it.

dos: Do keep financial-risk disclaimers, data limitations, and quality warnings near the workflow they affect.
Do use crimson for intent, teal for evidence, amber for caveat, and red for failure.
Do verify English and Simplified Chinese text in navigation, filters, buttons, and empty states.
donts: Don't preserve Ant Design's default navy/blue identity as the product brand.
Don't make the product look like a brokerage, trading terminal cosplay, crypto exchange, casino, or signal-selling page.
Don't use hype copy about beating the market, guaranteed returns, buy/sell advice, or profitable strategies.
Don't use purple-blue gradient SaaS tropes, glassmorphism, decorative chart colors, or oversized hero metrics.
